recommendations.title: The Jacket
recommendations.genres: Drama, Mystery, Science Fiction, Thriller, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: A military veteran goes on a journey into the future, where he can foresee his death and is left with questions that could save his life and those he loves.

recommendations.title: Elephant Song
recommendations.overview: A psychiatrist is drawn into a complex mind game when he questions a disturbed patient about the disappearance of a colleague.

recommendations.title: Ordinary People
recommendations.overview: A gym teacher and his female student look for her missing friend. But as they investigate, they find that her disappearance is a part of a larger conspiracy.

recommendations.title: I Remember You
recommendations.overview: After an older lady hangs herself in a church, a new psychiatrist discovers she was obsessed with the disappearance of his eight-year-old son, who vanished three years earlier. Meanwhile, three city dwellers are restoring a house when they realize it

recommendations.title: Maze Runner: The Death Cure
recommendations.overview: Thomas leads his group of escaped Gladers on their final and most dangerous mission yet. To save their friends, they must break into the legendary Last City, a WCKD-controlled labyrinth that may turn out to be the deadliest maze of all. Anyone who ma

recommendations.title: Wind River
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent teams with the town's veteran game tracker to investigate a murder that occurred on a Native American reservation.

recommendations.title: Something Wicked This Way Comes
recommendations.overview: In a small American town, a diabolical circus arrives, granting wishes for the townsfolk, but twisted as only the esteemed Mr. Dark can make them. Can two young boys overcome the worst the devil himself can deal out?

recommendations.title: The Disappearance of Haruhi Suzumiya
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Science Fiction, Mystery, Drama
recommendations.overview: A week before Christmas, Kyon wakes up in a world where the SOS Brigade doesn't exist. Mikuru and Yuki don't recognize him, and Haruhi and Itsuki seem to have vanished.

recommendations.title: The Flyboys
recommendations.overview: Two boys from a small town find their courage tested when they accidentally stow away aboard an airplane owned by the mob...

recommendations.title: The Blue Dahlia
recommendations.overview: Soon after a veteran returns from war, his cheating wife is found dead. He evades police in an attempt to find the real murderer.
